g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does loader.py fetch the YouTube transcript?')
sendPrompt('How does splitter.py chunk the transcript into pieces?')
sendPrompt('How does vector_store.py embed chunks and store them in FAISS?')
sendPrompt('How does retrieval.py find the most relevant chunks?')
sendPrompt('How does augmentation.py build the prompt from context and query?')
sendPrompt('How does generation.py call Gemini and return an answer?')
sendPrompt('What does the printed answer look like in this RAG pipeline?')
